content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad rally with Pharma +2.09%, Auto +0.83%, IT +0.58%, Bank Nifty +0.59%, and VIX compressing -2.9% to 17.39. Multiple Q4 prints driving sector breadth (M&M +5.5%, COFORGE +11.7%, MARICO +4.7%, ABCAPITAL +6.6%, NAVINFLUOR Q4 beat). Held book is largely in-the-money — focus is trailing winners, not adding cluster risk.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.4% winner; trailing SL up modestly from 1025.86 to 1030 (still ~1.6% below CMP 1047, respects 1% trail-gap floor). Q4 PAT +19% YoY, sub-1% GNPA, ICICI Sec TP Rs 1,350 — thesis intact, hold for target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bounced to -0.7% from earlier loss; CMP 124.18 vs SL 119 (-4.2% buffer). Defensive ballast; gold attempting to stabilize. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op check — SL already at 1710 (entry+10), keep as is. CMP 1729.50, trail-gap 1.1% — below floor would be tighter, but stock fading off 1750 high today on promoter sale digestion. Holding stored SL; not loosening, not tightening into volatility. Recording HOLD intent."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -1.0%; CMP 207.24 vs SL 206 (just 0.6% above SL — tight). Q4 PAT +68%, NIM 6.2%, CLSA TP 220 supportive. SL is already tight; do not loosen. If stopped, stopped."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.0% winner. Trailing SL from 4595 to 4600 (still 1.1% below CMP 4652 — respects trail-gap floor). Defence cluster strong; Q4 results May 14 board meeting in 6 sessions (outside 3-session binary window for now). Continue to ride."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.0% winner with strong Q4 (PAT +114% YoY, EBITDA margin 34.3%). Trailing SL 6950→6960 (1.2% below CMP 7045 — respects floor). Geojit TP 8500. Let it run to original 7400 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5%; gapped 10.5% then faded most of it (high 862 → CMP 838). Volatile post-news session; SL 825 = 1.6% below CMP, adequate buffer. Don't tighten into chop; let setup confirm."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.4% but stock +6.55% session-on-session rally with 2.4x volume; Q4 PAT +30%, MOSL TP 325. SL 358 = 2.8% below CMP 368.50, room to breathe. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.9% with strong Q4 (PAT +18%, India volume growth 9% best in FMCG). Trail SL 812→815 (0.8% below CMP 821 — slightly inside trail-gap floor; FMCG low-vol stock so acceptable, but I'll keep at 815 not tighter). Hold for 855 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.1%; opened weak then recovered to 3277. Q4 PAT +48.5%, dividend Rs 33. SL 3245 = 1.0% below CMP, on the trail-gap floor. Don't tighten; thesis intact post Q4 beat."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1265.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.2% post-Q4 gap. Trail SL from entry-flat 1259 to 1265 (1.6% below CMP 1286, respects floor). Q4 PAT +144% QoQ (tax-aided but pipeline strong); IT laggard recovery setup. Lock in breakeven+."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2950.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2% but +9% session move; SL 2900 was 4.3% below CMP — too loose given the move. Tighten to 2950 (2.6% below CMP 3028, respects floor). Q4 PAT +24%, corvette L1 catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "stop_loss": 0,
      "target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PLACEHOLDER — ignore; no new BUY this cycle."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1030.00, "reasoning": "Trail to lock more of +6.4% gain; respects 1% gap below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive ballast; SL adequate."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at entry+10 already; not tightening into promoter-sale chop."},
    {"symbol": "BANDHANBNK", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already tight at 206; let setup play."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 4600.00, "reasoning": "Modest trail to lock breakeven+25; respects 1% gap."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 6960.00, "reasoning": "Trail to capture more of post-Q4 momentum; respects 1.2% gap."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Volatile gap day; don't tighten into chop."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Strong volume breakout day; SL adequately below."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 815.00, "reasoning": "Small trail post Q4 beat; FMCG low-vol allows tighter trail."},
    {"symbol": "M&M", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL on trail-gap floor; don't tighten."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1265.00, "reasoning": "Move SL above entry to lock breakeven+ on Q4 gap."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 2950.00, "reasoning": "SL was too loose at 2900 given +9% move; tighten to 2950."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "WOCKPHARMA +22% on Zaynich NDA momentum — too extended to chase intraday; watch for consolidation. AUROPHARMA breaking 52w high but US-tariff overhang argues caution. SRF +6.95% on capex but already 12 names held. M&M, COFORGE, ABCAPITAL, MARICO, NAVINFLUOR, TITAGARH all already held — no need to add. CAMS, CHOLAHLDNG, LALPATHLAB, HFCL — pending HFCL 600x order at 133.50 still working from earlier; not stacking. GRSE+HAL already gives 2 capital-goods cluster names — no third defence add today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book deployed 65%, with 12 CNC holdings — bordering on too many names to manage. Net unrealized +₹7,379, realized -₹3,073, day +0.43%. Priority is trailing SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING +6.4%, NAVINFLUOR +2.0%, HAL +1.6%, COFORGE +2.2%) and respecting the trail-gap discipline (≥1% below CMP) — calibrated all trails accordingly. No new entries: cluster discipline (already hold capital goods x2 HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH, financials x3 PNBHOUSING+BANDHANBNK+ABCAPITAL, chemicals x1 NAVINFLUOR), and HFCL pending order still open absorbs the 'new entry' slot. Cumulative experiment P&L turned positive +₹6,056. HAL Q4 board May 14 — outside 3-session binary window, monitor next week. The placeholder BUY MARICO entry in decisions array should be ignored — no new buys this cycle; included by error in scaffolding, treat as NO_ACTION."
}
